name: sec-review
description: Cybersecurity review plugin for web services and servers: orchestrates a sec-expert subagent armed with top-tier, citation-grounded expertise (databases, frameworks, webservers, proxies, frontend, auth, TLS, containers, secrets, supply-chain) to analyze project code and cross-reference live CVE feeds (NVD, OSV.dev, GHSA), then produce a prioritized report with reliable fixes.
